title: muscaria crocea
intro: Muscaria crocea, also known as the yellow muscaria, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Muscaria crocea are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Muscaria crocea may be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal treatment.
